mapper.sql: SELECT m.*, COALESCE(sup.name, su.name, m.sender_id) AS sender_name, COALESCE(rup.name, ru.name, m.receiver_id) AS receiver_name FROM crm_messages m LEFT JOIN crm_users su ON m.sender_type IN ('admin','trainer') AND su.id = m.sender_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles sup ON m.sender_type = 'member' AND sup.user_id = m.sender_id LEFT JOIN crm_users ru ON m.receiver_type IN ('admin','trainer') AND ru.id = m.receiver_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles rup ON m.receiver_type = 'member' AND rup.user_id = m.receiver_id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_messages WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_messages WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND sender_id = #{senderId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_messages WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND is_notice = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_messages WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_messages (id, gym_id, sender_type, sender_id, receiver_type, receiver_id, content, is_read, is_notice, parent_id, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{gymId}, #{senderType}, #{senderId}, #{receiverType}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, 0, #{notice}, #{parentId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE crm_messages SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crm_messages SET is_read = 1 WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
